mapper.select: select djxh, dept_id, hyghbz, shxydm, nsrmc, nsrjc, zgswj_dm, jdxz_dm, zgswjmc, zgswskfj_dm, zgswskfjmc, ssgly_dm, ssglyxm, zzjglx_dm, zzjglxmc, hy_dm, hymc, djzclx_dm, djzclxmc, dwlsgx_dm, dwlsgxmc, zgrs, nsrzt_dm, nsrztmc, fzcrq, zxrq, zcdz, yzbm, lxr, lxdh, ghlb_dm, xtlb_dm, hjfl1_dm, hjfl2_dm, hjfl3_dm, hjfl5_dm, hjfl7_dm, hjfl8_dm, hjfl9_dm, sdghjg_dm, clghbj, clghrq, jcghdm, jcghmc, jcghzh, jcghhm, jcghhh, jcghyh, sjtb_sj, bz, nsrsbh from gh_hj where djxh = #{djxh}
mapper.update:
UPDATE gh_hj SET DEPT_ID = #{deptId}, HYGHBZ = #{hyghbz}, JCGHHM = NULL, JCGHZH = NULL, JCGHHH = NULL, JCGHYH = NULL WHERE DJXH IN
#{djxh}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gh_hj (djxh, dept_id, hyghbz, shxydm, nsrsbh, nsrmc, nsrjc, zgswj_dm, jdxz_dm, zgswskfj_dm, ssgly_dm, zzjglx_dm, hy_dm, djzclx_dm, dwlsgx_dm, zgrs, nsrzt_dm, zcdz, yzbm, lxr, lxdh, ghlb_dm, xtlb_dm, hjfl8_dm, clghbj, clghrq, jcghdm, jcghmc, jcghzh, jcghhm, jcghhh, jcghyh, hjfl1_dm, hjfl2_dm, hjfl3_dm, hjfl5_dm, hjfl7_dm, sdghjg_dm, fzcrq, bz, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{vo.djxh}, #{vo.deptId}, #{vo.hyghbz}, #{vo.shxydm}, #{vo.nsrsbh}, #{vo.nsrmc}, #{vo.nsrjc}, #{vo.zgswjDm}, #{vo.jdxzDm}, #{vo.zgswskfjDm}, #{vo.ssglyDm}, #{vo.zzjglxDm}, #{vo.hyDm}, #{vo.djzclxDm}, #{vo.dwlsgxDm}, #{vo.zgrs}, #{vo.nsrztDm}, #{vo.zcdz}, #{vo.yzbm}, #{vo.lxr}, #{vo.lxdh}, #{vo.ghlbDm}, #{vo.xtlbDm}, #{vo.hjfl8Dm}, #{vo.clghbj}, #{vo.clghrq}, #{vo.jcghdm}, #{vo.jcghmc}, #{vo.jcghzh}, #{vo.jcghhm}, #{vo.jcghhh}, #{vo.jcghyh}, #{vo.hjfl1Dm}, #{vo.hjfl2Dm}, #{vo.hjfl3Dm}, #{vo.hjfl5Dm}, #{vo.hjfl7Dm}, #{vo.sdghjgDm}, #{vo.fzcrq}, #{vo.bz}, #{vo.createBy}, NOW(), #{vo.updateBy}, NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM gh_hj WHERE djxh IN
#{djxh}
